title: GitHub - Conradqh/scrapemychats: Export a ChatGPT account (incl. business/Team) to a local searchable offline archive - conversations, files, and a single-file HTML viewer
excerpt: Export a ChatGPT account (incl. business/Team) to a local searchable offline archive - conversations, files, and a single-file HTML viewer - Conradqh/scrapemychats
content_html:
Leaving a ChatGPT business account? This tool saves your conversations before they're gone.

ChatGPT's business and Team accounts often have no "Export data" button — the one-click archive that personal accounts get is simply missing, and there's no official way to take your conversation history with you when the workspace is closed or your subscription is cancelled. scrapemychats fills that gap: it exports every conversation — text and attached files — to your own computer, then builds a beautiful, searchable, offline archive you can keep forever. (It works on personal accounts too.)

Your data never leaves your machine. The tool drives a real Chrome window on your computer using your own logged-in ChatGPT session. It never sees your password, and nothing is sent anywhere except to chatgpt.com itself.

The offline viewer: categories on the left, your chats in the middle, the full conversation — tables, files, images — on the right. (Sample data shown.)

What you get

export/
├── viewer.html                     ← open this: search + browse everything
├── manifest.csv                    ← one row per chat: status, counts
├── errors.log                      ← anything that couldn't be fetched
└── 001_Some Chat Title_6a5f6592/
    ├── conversation.json           ← complete raw data (every message, tool call)
    ├── conversation.md             ← readable transcript
    └── files/                      ← attachments, images & generated files

The viewer is a single self-contained HTML file: instant full-text search across all chats, optional Personal/Work categorisation, inline image thumbnails, keyboard navigation. No server, no internet, no dependencies — it works from a USB stick.

Full-text search is instant and highlights matches in the results and inside the open chat. (Sample data shown.)

Quick start (if you're comfortable with a terminal)

Requirements: Python 3.10+, Google Chrome (or Microsoft Edge with --browser-channel msedge).

pip install -r requirements.txt

# 1. Test with a few chats first (a Chrome window opens — log into ChatGPT
#    in it; if you have multiple workspaces, switch to the right one)
python export_chats.py --limit 3

# 2. Check the export/ folder looks right, then run the full export
python export_chats.py

# 3. Build the viewer, then open export/viewer.html in your browser
python build_viewer.py

The chat list is discovered automatically (including chats inside Projects) and saved to chats.csv. Alternatively supply your own list with --csv mylist.csv (first column: chat URL, second: title).

Never used a terminal? Start here

You don't need to be a programmer. There are ~10 steps and each one is a thing you type or click. Set aside 20 minutes for setup, then the export itself runs unattended for a few hours.

Windows

  1. Install Python. Go to python.org/downloads, click the big yellow button, run the installer — and tick the box that says "Add python.exe to PATH" on the first screen (important!).
  2. Install Google Chrome if you don't have it: google.com/chrome.
  3. Download this tool. On this page on GitHub, click the green <> Code button → Download ZIP. Then open your Downloads folder, right-click scrapemychats-main.zip → Extract All.
  4. Open a terminal in that folder. Open the extracted scrapemychats-main folder in File Explorer, click in the address bar at the top, type powershell and press Enter. A blue/black text window opens — that's the terminal, already pointed at the right folder.
  5. Install the one required package. Type this and press Enter: 
    pip install -r requirements.txt
  6. Do a small test run. Type: 
    python export_chats.py --limit 3
    A Chrome window opens. Log into ChatGPT in it (pick the right workspace if you have several). The tool then exports 3 chats and stops.
  7. Look inside the new export folder — you should see a numbered folder per chat. If it looks right, run the full export: 
    python export_chats.py
    Leave it running (minimise Chrome, don't close it). Big accounts take a few hours — this is deliberate, see "Things to know" below. If your computer sleeps or you interrupt it, just run the same command again — it continues where it left off.
  8. Build your archive. When it finishes, type: 
    python build_viewer.py
    then double-click export\viewer.html. That's your archive — searchable, offline, yours.

Mac (OS X)

  1. Install Python. Go to python.org/downloads, download the macOS installer, and run it with the default options.
  2. Install Google Chrome if you don't have it: google.com/chrome.
  3. Download this tool. On this page on GitHub, click the green <> Code button → Download ZIP. It lands in Downloads and usually unzips itself into a scrapemychats-main folder (double-click the ZIP if not).
  4. Open Terminal. Press Cmd + Space, type Terminal, press Enter.
  5. Point it at the tool's folder. Type this and press Enter: 
    cd ~/Downloads/scrapemychats-main
  6. Install the one required package: 
    python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt
  7. Do a small test run: 
    python3 export_chats.py --limit 3
    A Chrome window opens. Log into ChatGPT in it (pick the right workspace if you have several). The tool exports 3 chats and stops.
  8. Check the new export folder, then run the full export: 
    python3 export_chats.py
    Leave it running (minimise Chrome, don't close it); big accounts take a few hours. Interrupted? Run the same command again — it resumes.
  9. Build your archive: 
    python3 build_viewer.py
    then double-click export/viewer.html.

On a Mac, type python3 wherever this README says python.

Stuck? Let an AI walk you through it

Honestly, the easiest path for a non-technical person is to let an AI assistant drive:

  • With ChatGPT (or any chatbot): paste this prompt, then follow along — it will give you one instruction at a time and decode any error you paste back:

    I'm a complete beginner on [Windows / Mac]. Help me set up and run the open-source tool "scrapemychats" from GitHub (paste this page's web address here). It needs Python and Google Chrome, then pip install -r requirements.txt, then python export_chats.py --limit 3 as a test, then python export_chats.py for the full run, then python build_viewer.py. Walk me through it one step at a time and wait for me to confirm each step. If I paste an error, explain the fix simply.

  • With an AI coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, etc.): these tools can run the steps for you. Install the agent, open the scrapemychats folder with it, and say: "Set this tool up and run the export for me — start with a 3-chat test run." The agent installs the dependency, starts the script, and tells you when to log into the Chrome window it opens. It can also fix anything unexpected (a changed endpoint, an odd error) on the spot — which a static README never can.

Categories (optional)

cp categories.example.json categories.json     # Windows: copy categories.example.json categories.json
# edit the groups / subcategories / keywords to match your life
python build_viewer.py

Chats are auto-filed by keyword scoring (title matches weigh 4×). Anything matching nothing lands in Unsorted — skim that list, add keywords, and re-run; regeneration takes seconds.

Things to know

  • It's slow on purpose. ChatGPT throttles bulk access ("You're making requests too quickly"). The script paces itself (~10–20 s per chat), backs off in escalating steps when throttled, and permanently slows down each time it happens. A 600-chat archive takes a few hours. Let it run.
  • It's resumable. Interrupt any time; re-running skips everything already exported and retries failures.
  • Some old files are gone forever. OpenAI deletes uploaded file content server-side after a retention period. Those downloads fail with "file not found" — logged in errors.log — but the conversation text referencing them is still captured. No export method can recover them. The tool also recovers what it can from your account's file Library and from code-generated (sandbox) files.
  • Headless doesn't work. ChatGPT's bot protection blocks invisible browsers; the visible Chrome window is required.
  • Privacy. export/, chats.csv, and browser_profile/ are git-ignored. browser_profile/ contains your live ChatGPT login — never share or commit it, and delete it when you're done.

How it works

Rather than scraping the page or asking for your credentials, the script waits for ChatGPT's own frontend to request each conversation's JSON from its backend and captures that response. Attachments come through the files API, generated files through the interpreter-download API, and stale uploads through the account Library — all using the same session headers the page itself uses. This makes the export complete and robust to UI redesigns.

Disclaimer

For exporting your own data from your own account. Automating a website may be subject to its terms of use — this tool deliberately behaves like a (patient) human reader, but you use it at your own risk. Not affiliated with OpenAI.

License

MIT

sentences.en: Big accounts take a few hours — this is deliberate, see "Things to know" below.
sentences.zh: 大账户需要几个小时——这是有意为之的，请参阅下面的“须知事项”。

sentences.en: If your computer sleeps or you interrupt it, just run the same command again — it continues where it left off.
sentences.zh: 如果您的计算机处于睡眠状态或您中断了它，只需再次运行相同的命令即可 - 它会从中断处继续。

blocks.html_en:
• Build your archive. When it finishes, type: 
    python build_viewer.py
    then double-click export\viewer.html. That's your archive — searchable, offline, yours.

sentences.en: Build your archive.
sentences.zh: 建立你的档案。

sentences.en: When it finishes, type: python build_viewer.py then double-click export\viewer.html.
sentences.zh: 完成后，输入：python build_viewer.py，然后双击export\viewer.html。

sentences.en: That's your archive — searchable, offline, yours.
sentences.zh: 这就是您的存档 — 可搜索、离线，属于您。

blocks.html_en: Mac (OS X)

sentences.en: Mac (OS X)
sentences.zh: 苹果电脑 (OS X)

blocks.html_en: • Install Python. Go to python.org/downloads, download the macOS installer, and run it with the default options.

sentences.en: Install Python.
sentences.zh: 安装Python。

sentences.en: Go to python.org/downloads, download the macOS installer, and run it with the default options.
sentences.zh: 访问 python.org/downloads，下载 macOS 安装程序，并使用默认选项运行它。

blocks.html_en: • Install Google Chrome if you don't have it: google.com/chrome.

sentences.en: Install Google Chrome if you don't have it: google.com/chrome.
sentences.zh: 如果没有，请安装 Google Chrome：google.com/chrome。

blocks.html_en: • Download this tool. On this page on GitHub, click the green <> Code button → Download ZIP. It lands in Downloads and usually unzips itself into a scrapemychats-main folder (double-click the ZIP if not).

sentences.en: Download this tool.
sentences.zh: 下载这个工具。

sentences.en: On this page on GitHub, click the green <> Code button → Download ZIP.
sentences.zh: 在 GitHub 的此页面上，单击绿色 <> 代码按钮 → 下载 ZIP。

sentences.en: It lands in Downloads and usually unzips itself into a scrapemychats-main folder (double-click the ZIP if not).
sentences.zh: 它会进入“下载”并通常将其自身解压缩到 scrapemychats-main 文件夹中（如果没有，请双击 ZIP）。

blocks.html_en: • Open Terminal. Press Cmd + Space, type Terminal, press Enter.

sentences.en: Open Terminal.
sentences.zh: 打开终端。

sentences.en: Press Cmd + Space, type Terminal, press Enter.
sentences.zh: 按 Cmd + 空格键，输入 Terminal，然后按 Enter。

blocks.html_en:
• Point it at the tool's folder. Type this and press Enter: 
    cd ~/Downloads/scrapemychats-main

sentences.en: Point it at the tool's folder.
sentences.zh: 将其指向工具的文件夹。

sentences.en: Type this and press Enter: cd ~/Downloads/scrapemychats-main
sentences.zh: 输入以下内容并按 Enter： cd ~/Downloads/scrapemychats-main

blocks.html_en:
• Install the one required package: 
    python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt

sentences.en: Install the one required package: python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt
sentences.zh: 安装所需的一个包： python3 -m pip install -rrequirements.txt

blocks.html_en:
• Do a small test run: 
    python3 export_chats.py --limit 3
    A Chrome window opens. Log into ChatGPT in it (pick the right workspace if you have several). The tool exports 3 chats and stops.

sentences.en: Do a small test run: python3 export_chats.py --limit 3 A Chrome window opens.
sentences.zh: 做一个小测试运行： python3 export_chats.py --limit 3 Chrome 窗口打开。

sentences.en: Log into ChatGPT in it (pick the right workspace if you have several).
sentences.zh: 登录其中的 ChatGPT（如果有多个工作区，请选择正确的工作区）。

sentences.en: The tool exports 3 chats and stops.
sentences.zh: 该工具导出 3 个聊天并停止。

blocks.html_en:
• Check the new export folder, then run the full export: 
    python3 export_chats.py
    Leave it running (minimise Chrome, don't close it); big accounts take a few hours. Interrupted? Run the same command again — it resumes.

sentences.en: Check the new export folder, then run the full export: python3 export_chats.py Leave it running (minimise Chrome, don't close it); big accounts take a few hours.
sentences.zh: 检查新的导出文件夹，然后运行完整导出：python3 export_chats.py 让它运行（最小化Chrome，不要关闭它）；大帐户需要几个小时。

sentences.en: Interrupted?
sentences.zh: 被打扰了？

sentences.en: Run the same command again — it resumes.
sentences.zh: 再次运行相同的命令 - 它会恢复。

blocks.html_en:
• Build your archive: 
    python3 build_viewer.py
    then double-click export/viewer.html.

sentences.en: Build your archive: python3 build_viewer.py then double-click export/viewer.html.
sentences.zh: 构建您的存档：python3 build_viewer.py，然后双击 export/viewer.html。

blocks.html_en: On a Mac, type python3 wherever this README says python.

sentences.en: On a Mac, type python3 wherever this README says python.
sentences.zh: 在 Mac 上，只要本自述文件中提到 python，请输入 python3。

blocks.html_en: On a Mac, type python3 wherever this README says python.

sentences.en: On a Mac, type python3 wherever this README says python.
sentences.zh: 在 Mac 上，只要本自述文件中提到 python，请输入 python3。

blocks.html_en: Stuck? Let an AI walk you through it

sentences.en: Stuck?
sentences.zh: 卡住？

sentences.en: Let an AI walk you through it
sentences.zh: 让 AI 引导您完成整个过程

blocks.html_en: Honestly, the easiest path for a non-technical person is to let an AI assistant drive:

sentences.en: Honestly, the easiest path for a non-technical person is to let an AI assistant drive:
sentences.zh: 老实说，对于非技术人员来说，最简单的途径就是让人工智能助手来驾驶：

blocks.html_en:
• With ChatGPT (or any chatbot): paste this prompt, then follow along — it will give you one instruction at a time and decode any error you paste back:

    I'm a complete beginner on [Windows / Mac]. Help me set up and run the open-source tool "scrapemychats" from GitHub (paste this page's web address here). It needs Python and Google Chrome, then pip install -r requirements.txt, then python export_chats.py --limit 3 as a test, then python export_chats.py for the full run, then python build_viewer.py. Walk me through it one step at a time and wait for me to confirm each step. If I paste an error, explain the fix simply.

sentences.en: With ChatGPT (or any chatbot): paste this prompt, then follow along — it will give you one instruction at a time and decode any error you paste back: I'm a complete beginner on [Windows / Mac].
sentences.zh: 使用 ChatGPT（或任何聊天机器人）：粘贴此提示，然后按照提示进行操作 - 它一次会给您一条指令，并解码您粘贴回的任何错误：我是 [Windows / Mac] 的完全初学者。

sentences.en: Help me set up and run the open-source tool "scrapemychats" from GitHub (paste this page's web address here).
sentences.zh: 帮助我设置并运行 GitHub 上的开源工具“scrapemychats”（在此处粘贴此页面的网址）。

sentences.en: It needs Python and Google Chrome, then pip install -r requirements.txt, then python export_chats.py --limit 3 as a test, then python export_chats.py for the full run, then python build_viewer.py.
sentences.zh: 它需要Python和Google Chrome，然后pip install -rrequirements.txt，然后pythonexport_chats.py --limit 3作为测试，然后pythonexport_chats.py用于完整运行，然后pythonbuild_viewer.py。

sentences.en: Walk me through it one step at a time and wait for me to confirm each step.
sentences.zh: 一步一步引导我完成，并等待我确认每一步。

sentences.en: If I paste an error, explain the fix simply.
sentences.zh: 如果我粘贴错误，请简单解释修复方法。

Walk me through it one step at a time and wait for me to confirm each step. If I paste an error, explain the fix simply.

sentences.en: Help me set up and run the open-source tool "scrapemychats" from GitHub (paste this page's web address here).

blocks.html_en: • With an AI coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, etc.): these tools can run the steps for you. Install the agent, open the scrapemychats folder with it, and say: "Set this tool up and run the export for me — start with a 3-chat test run." The agent installs the dependency, starts the script, and tells you when to log into the Chrome window it opens. It can also fix anything unexpected (a changed endpoint, an odd error) on the spot — which a static README never can.

sentences.en: With an AI coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, etc.): these tools can run the steps for you.
sentences.zh: 使用 AI 编码代理（Claude Code、Codex 等）：这些工具可以为您运行这些步骤。

sentences.en: Install the agent, open the scrapemychats folder with it, and say: "Set this tool up and run the export for me — start with a 3-chat test run."
sentences.zh: 安装代理，用它打开 scrapemychats 文件夹，然后说：“设置此工具并为我运行导出 - 从 3 聊天测试运行开始。”

sentences.en: The agent installs the dependency, starts the script, and tells you when to log into the Chrome window it opens.
sentences.zh: 代理安装依赖项，启动脚本，并告诉您何时登录它打开的 Chrome 窗口。

sentences.en: It can also fix anything unexpected (a changed endpoint, an odd error) on the spot — which a static README never can.
sentences.zh: 它还可以当场修复任何意外的情况（端点的改变、奇怪的错误）——这是静态自述文件永远无法做到的。

blocks.html_en: With an AI coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, etc.): these tools can run the steps for you. Install the agent, open the scrapemychats folder with it, and say: "Set this tool up and run the export for me — start with a 3-chat test run." The agent installs the dependency, starts the script, and tells you when to log into the Chrome window it opens. It can also fix anything unexpected (a changed endpoint, an odd error) on the spot — which a static README never can.

sentences.en: With an AI coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, etc.): these tools can run the steps for you.
sentences.zh: 使用 AI 编码代理（Claude Code、Codex 等）：这些工具可以为您运行这些步骤。

sentences.en: Install the agent, open the scrapemychats folder with it, and say: "Set this tool up and run the export for me — start with a 3-chat test run."
sentences.zh: 安装代理，用它打开 scrapemychats 文件夹，然后说：“设置此工具并为我运行导出 - 从 3 聊天测试运行开始。”

sentences.en: The agent installs the dependency, starts the script, and tells you when to log into the Chrome window it opens.
sentences.zh: 代理安装依赖项，启动脚本，并告诉您何时登录它打开的 Chrome 窗口。

sentences.en: It can also fix anything unexpected (a changed endpoint, an odd error) on the spot — which a static README never can.
sentences.zh: 它还可以当场修复任何意外的情况（端点的改变、奇怪的错误）——这是静态自述文件永远无法做到的。

blocks.html_en: Categories (optional)

sentences.en: Categories (optional)
sentences.zh: 类别（可选）

blocks.html_en: Chats are auto-filed by keyword scoring (title matches weigh 4×). Anything matching nothing lands in Unsorted — skim that list, add keywords, and re-run; regeneration takes seconds.

sentences.en: Chats are auto-filed by keyword scoring (title matches weigh 4×).
sentences.zh: 聊天内容按关键字评分自动归档（标题匹配权重为 4 倍）。

sentences.en: Anything matching nothing lands in Unsorted — skim that list, add keywords, and re-run; regeneration takes seconds.
sentences.zh: 任何不匹配的内容都会出现在“未排序”中——浏览该列表，添加关键字，然后重新运行；再生需要几秒钟。

blocks.html_en: Things to know

sentences.en: Things to know
sentences.zh: 要知道的事情

blocks.html_en: • It's slow on purpose. ChatGPT throttles bulk access ("You're making requests too quickly"). The script paces itself (~10–20 s per chat), backs off in escalating steps when throttled, and permanently slows down each time it happens. A 600-chat archive takes a few hours. Let it run.

sentences.en: It's slow on purpose.
sentences.zh: 故意慢的。

sentences.en: ChatGPT throttles bulk access ("You're making requests too quickly").
sentences.zh: ChatGPT 限制批量访问（“您发出请求的速度太快”）。

sentences.en: The script paces itself (~10–20 s per chat), backs off in escalating steps when throttled, and permanently slows down each time it happens.
sentences.zh: 脚本会自行调整速度（每个聊天大约 10-20 秒），在受到限制时会逐步退出，并且每次发生时都会永久减慢速度。

sentences.en: A 600-chat archive takes a few hours.
sentences.zh: 600 条聊天记录的存档需要几个小时。

sentences.en: Let it run.
sentences.zh: 让它运行。

blocks.html_en: • It's resumable. Interrupt any time; re-running skips everything already exported and retries failures.

sentences.en: It's resumable.
sentences.zh: 是可以恢复的

sentences.en: Interrupt any time; re-running skips everything already exported and retries failures.
sentences.zh: 随时打断；重新运行会跳过所有已导出的内容并重试失败。

blocks.html_en: • Some old files are gone forever. OpenAI deletes uploaded file content server-side after a retention period. Those downloads fail with "file not found" — logged in errors.log — but the conversation text referencing them is still captured. No export method can recover them. The tool also recovers what it can from your account's file Library and from code-generated (sandbox) files.

sentences.en: Some old files are gone forever.
sentences.zh: 一些旧文件永远消失了。

sentences.en: OpenAI deletes uploaded file content server-side after a retention period.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 在保留期过后会在服务器端删除上传的文件内容。

sentences.en: Those downloads fail with "file not found" — logged in errors.log — but the conversation text referencing them is still captured.
sentences.zh: 这些下载失败并显示“找不到文件”（记录在errors.log中），但引用它们的对话文本仍然被捕获。

sentences.en: No export method can recover them.
sentences.zh: 没有导出方法可以恢复它们。

sentences.en: The tool also recovers what it can from your account's file Library and from code-generated (sandbox) files.
sentences.zh: 该工具还可以从您帐户的文件库和代码生成（沙箱）文件中恢复内容。

blocks.html_en: • Headless doesn't work. ChatGPT's bot protection blocks invisible browsers; the visible Chrome window is required.

sentences.en: Headless doesn't work.
sentences.zh: 无头不行。

sentences.en: ChatGPT's bot protection blocks invisible browsers; the visible Chrome window is required.
sentences.zh: ChatGPT 的机器人防护可阻止隐形浏览器；需要可见的 Chrome 窗口。

blocks.html_en: • Privacy. export/, chats.csv, and browser_profile/ are git-ignored. browser_profile/ contains your live ChatGPT login — never share or commit it, and delete it when you're done.

sentences.en: Privacy.
sentences.zh: 隐私。

sentences.en: export/, chats.csv, and browser_profile/ are git-ignored.
sentences.zh: export/、chats.csv 和 browser_profile/ 被 git 忽略。

sentences.en: browser_profile/ contains your live ChatGPT login — never share or commit it, and delete it when you're done.
sentences.zh: browser_profile/ 包含您的实时 ChatGPT 登录信息 - 切勿共享或提交它，并在完成后将其删除。

blocks.html_en: How it works

sentences.en: How it works
sentences.zh: 它是如何运作的

blocks.html_en: Rather than scraping the page or asking for your credentials, the script waits for ChatGPT's own frontend to request each conversation's JSON from its backend and captures that response. Attachments come through the files API, generated files through the interpreter-download API, and stale uploads through the account Library — all using the same session headers the page itself uses. This makes the export complete and robust to UI redesigns.

sentences.en: Rather than scraping the page or asking for your credentials, the script waits for ChatGPT's own frontend to request each conversation's JSON from its backend and captures that response.
sentences.zh: 该脚本不会抓取页面或询问您的凭据，而是等待 ChatGPT 自己的前端从其后端请求每个对话的 JSON 并捕获该响应。

sentences.en: Attachments come through the files API, generated files through the interpreter-download API, and stale uploads through the account Library — all using the same session headers the page itself uses.
sentences.zh: 附件来自文件 API，通过解释器下载 API 生成文件，以及通过帐户库上传过时的文件 - 所有这些都使用页面本身使用的相同会话标头。

sentences.en: This makes the export complete and robust to UI redesigns.
sentences.zh: 这使得导出完整且对 UI 重新设计而言稳健。

blocks.html_en: Disclaimer

sentences.en: Disclaimer
sentences.zh: 免责声明

blocks.html_en: For exporting your own data from your own account. Automating a website may be subject to its terms of use — this tool deliberately behaves like a (patient) human reader, but you use it at your own risk. Not affiliated with OpenAI.

sentences.en: For exporting your own data from your own account.
sentences.zh: 用于从您自己的帐户导出您自己的数据。

sentences.en: Automating a website may be subject to its terms of use — this tool deliberately behaves like a (patient) human reader, but you use it at your own risk.
sentences.zh: 网站自动化可能会受到其使用条款的约束——该工具故意表现得像（耐心的）人类读者，但您使用它的风险由您自行承担。

sentences.en: Not affiliated with OpenAI.
sentences.zh: 不隶属于 OpenAI。

blocks.html_en: License

sentences.en: License
sentences.zh: 执照

blocks.html_en: MIT

content_html_zh:
离开 ChatGPT 企业帐户？ 该工具可以在您的对话消失之前保存它们。

ChatGPT 的企业和团队帐户通常没有“导出数据”按钮 - 个人帐户获得的一键存档根本就丢失了，并且当工作区关闭或您的订阅被取消时，没有正式的方法可以获取您的对话历史记录。 scrapemychats 填补了这一空白：它将每个对话（文本和附加文件）导出到您自己的计算机，然后构建一个漂亮的、可搜索的离线存档，您可以永久保存。 （它也适用于个人帐户。）

您的数据永远不会离开您的机器。 该工具使用您自己登录的 ChatGPT 会话在您的计算机上驱动真实的 Chrome 窗口。 它永远不会看到您的密码，并且除了 chatgpt.com 本身之外，不会向任何地方发送任何内容。

离线查看器：类别在左侧，聊天内容在中间，完整对话（表格、文件、图像）在右侧。 （显示示例数据。）

你得到什么

export/
├── viewer.html                     ← open this: search + browse everything
├── manifest.csv                    ← one row per chat: status, counts
├── errors.log                      ← anything that couldn't be fetched
└── 001_Some Chat Title_6a5f6592/
    ├── conversation.json           ← complete raw data (every message, tool call)
    ├── conversation.md             ← readable transcript
    └── files/                      ← attachments, images & generated files

查看器是一个独立的 HTML 文件：跨所有聊天的即时全文搜索、可选的个人/工作分类、内嵌图像缩略图、键盘导航。 没有服务器、没有互联网、没有依赖性——它可以通过 USB 记忆棒运行。

全文搜索是即时的，并突出显示结果中和开放聊天中的匹配项。 （显示示例数据。）

快速启动（如果您熟悉终端）

要求：Python 3.10+、Google Chrome（或带 --browser-channel msedge 的 Microsoft Edge）。

pip install -r requirements.txt

# 1. Test with a few chats first (a Chrome window opens — log into ChatGPT
#    in it; if you have multiple workspaces, switch to the right one)
python export_chats.py --limit 3

# 2. Check the export/ folder looks right, then run the full export
python export_chats.py

# 3. Build the viewer, then open export/viewer.html in your browser
python build_viewer.py

聊天列表会自动发现（包括项目内的聊天）并保存到 chats.csv。 或者使用 --csv mylist.csv 提供您自己的列表（第一列：聊天 URL，第二列：标题）。

从未使用过终端？ 从这里开始

你不需要成为一名程序员。 有大约 10 个步骤，每个步骤都是您键入或单击的内容。 留出 20 分钟进行设置，然后导出本身会在无人值守的情况下运行几个小时。

视窗

  1. 安装Python。 转到 python.org/downloads，单击黄色大按钮，运行安装程序 - 并在第一个屏幕上勾选“将 python.exe 添加到 PATH”框（重要！）。
  2. 如果没有，请安装 Google Chrome：google.com/chrome。
  3. 下载这个工具。 在 GitHub 的此页面上，单击绿色 <> 代码按钮 → 下载 ZIP。 然后打开“下载”文件夹，右键单击 scrapemychats-main.zip → 全部解压。
  4. 在该文件夹中打开终端。 在文件资源管理器中打开提取的 scrapemychats-main 文件夹，单击顶部地址栏中的 ，输入 powershell 并按 Enter。 将打开一个蓝色/黑色文本窗口 - 这是终端，已经指向正确的文件夹。
  5. 安装所需的一个包。 输入以下内容并按 Enter： pip install -rrequirements.txt
  6. 做一个小测试运行。 类型： python export_chats.py --limit 3 Chrome 窗口打开。 登录其中的 ChatGPT（如果有多个工作区，请选择正确的工作区）。 然后该工具导出 3 个聊天内容并停止。
  7. 查看新导出文件夹的内部 - 您应该看到每个聊天都有一个编号的文件夹。 如果看起来正确，请运行完整导出： python export_chats.py 使其保持运行（最小化 Chrome，不要关闭它）。 大账户需要几个小时——这是有意为之的，请参阅下面的“须知事项”。 如果您的计算机处于睡眠状态或您中断了它，只需再次运行相同的命令即可 - 它会从中断处继续。
  8. 建立你的档案。 完成后，输入：python build_viewer.py，然后双击export\viewer.html。 这就是您的存档 — 可搜索、离线，属于您。

苹果电脑 (OS X)

  1. 安装Python。 访问 python.org/downloads，下载 macOS 安装程序，并使用默认选项运行它。
  2. 如果没有，请安装 Google Chrome：google.com/chrome。
  3. 下载这个工具。 在 GitHub 的此页面上，单击绿色 <> 代码按钮 → 下载 ZIP。 它会进入“下载”并通常将其自身解压缩到 scrapemychats-main 文件夹中（如果没有，请双击 ZIP）。
  4. 打开终端。 按 Cmd + 空格键，输入 Terminal，然后按 Enter。
  5. 将其指向工具的文件夹。 输入以下内容并按 Enter： cd ~/Downloads/scrapemychats-main
  6. 安装所需的一个包： python3 -m pip install -rrequirements.txt
  7. 做一个小测试运行： python3 export_chats.py --limit 3 Chrome 窗口打开。 登录其中的 ChatGPT（如果有多个工作区，请选择正确的工作区）。 该工具导出 3 个聊天并停止。
  8. 检查新的导出文件夹，然后运行完整导出：python3 export_chats.py 让它运行（最小化Chrome，不要关闭它）；大帐户需要几个小时。 被打扰了？ 再次运行相同的命令 - 它会恢复。
  9. 构建您的存档：python3 build_viewer.py，然后双击 export/viewer.html。
在 Mac 上，只要本自述文件中提到 python，请输入 python3。

卡住？ 让 AI 引导您完成整个过程

老实说，对于非技术人员来说，最简单的途径就是让人工智能助手来驾驶：

  • 使用 ChatGPT（或任何聊天机器人）：粘贴此提示，然后按照提示进行操作 - 它一次会给您一条指令，并解码您粘贴回的任何错误：我是 [Windows / Mac] 的完全初学者。 帮助我设置并运行 GitHub 上的开源工具“scrapemychats”（在此处粘贴此页面的网址）。 它需要Python和Google Chrome，然后pip install -rrequirements.txt，然后pythonexport_chats.py --limit 3作为测试，然后pythonexport_chats.py用于完整运行，然后pythonbuild_viewer.py。 一步一步引导我完成，并等待我确认每一步。 如果我粘贴错误，请简单解释修复方法。
  • 使用 AI 编码代理（Claude Code、Codex 等）：这些工具可以为您运行这些步骤。 安装代理，用它打开 scrapemychats 文件夹，然后说：“设置此工具并为我运行导出 - 从 3 聊天测试运行开始。” 代理安装依赖项，启动脚本，并告诉您何时登录它打开的 Chrome 窗口。 它还可以当场修复任何意外的情况（端点的改变、奇怪的错误）——这是静态自述文件永远无法做到的。

类别（可选）

cp categories.example.json categories.json     # Windows: copy categories.example.json categories.json
# edit the groups / subcategories / keywords to match your life
python build_viewer.py

聊天内容按关键字评分自动归档（标题匹配权重为 4 倍）。 任何不匹配的内容都会出现在“未排序”中——浏览该列表，添加关键字，然后重新运行；再生需要几秒钟。

要知道的事情

  • 故意慢的。 ChatGPT 限制批量访问（“您发出请求的速度太快”）。 脚本会自行调整速度（每个聊天大约 10-20 秒），在受到限制时会逐步退出，并且每次发生时都会永久减慢速度。 600 条聊天记录的存档需要几个小时。 让它运行。
  • 是可以恢复的 随时打断；重新运行会跳过所有已导出的内容并重试失败。
  • 一些旧文件永远消失了。 OpenAI 在保留期过后会在服务器端删除上传的文件内容。 这些下载失败并显示“找不到文件”（记录在errors.log中），但引用它们的对话文本仍然被捕获。 没有导出方法可以恢复它们。 该工具还可以从您帐户的文件库和代码生成（沙箱）文件中恢复内容。
  • 无头不行。 ChatGPT 的机器人防护可阻止隐形浏览器；需要可见的 Chrome 窗口。
  • 隐私。 export/、chats.csv 和 browser_profile/ 被 git 忽略。 browser_profile/ 包含您的实时 ChatGPT 登录信息 - 切勿共享或提交它，并在完成后将其删除。

它是如何运作的

该脚本不会抓取页面或询问您的凭据，而是等待 ChatGPT 自己的前端从其后端请求每个对话的 JSON 并捕获该响应。 附件来自文件 API，通过解释器下载 API 生成文件，以及通过帐户库上传过时的文件 - 所有这些都使用页面本身使用的相同会话标头。 这使得导出完整且对 UI 重新设计而言稳健。

免责声明

用于从您自己的帐户导出您自己的数据。 网站自动化可能会受到其使用条款的约束——该工具故意表现得像（耐心的）人类读者，但您使用它的风险由您自行承担。 不隶属于 OpenAI。
